title: 4 Rolls Christmas Deco Mesh Rolls for Wreath Making 10 inch x 10 Yards White Stripe Green Red Xmas Poly Ribbon Christmas Mesh Ribbon Rolls for Xmas Wreath Tree Garland Crafting Decorations
features: 🎄** Christmas Classic Decorations, Christmas Deco Mesh Rolls for Wreath Making ** -- The package includes 4 rolls of Christmas classic color poly mesh ribbon roll, 4 different colors - red, white, green, red and white stripe with tinsel foil, the colors are bright and shiny, perfect for Christmas wreath making and tree decorations, as well as various other Christmas decoration needs

🎄** Size ** -- Each roll measures 26 cm/10.2 inch in width and 10 yards in length, 4 rolls in total, there will be sufficient area for you to use, and you can also cut the mesh ribbon to the suitable length or different shapes according to your different crafts needs

🎄** Premium Material ** -- The poly mesh ribbon is made of premium polypropylene with metallic foil, this plastic mesh is flexible, lightweight, waterproof, durable, easy for you to roll up and shape and reusable

🎄** Versatile Use ** -- Our deco mesh rolls can be twisted, stretched, bent and molded into any desired shape, perfect for Christmas wreath decorations and Christmas tree decorations, as well as wrapping stairs, railings, tables, chairs, doors, porches, windows, baskets and outdoor garden xmas decoration
🎄** Buy With Confidence ** -- Please contact us at any time if you have any issue about the deco mesh ribbon, we will answer you within 24 hours and find a best solution for you
